title: SelcomWebhookPayload
description: Selcom webhook transaction notification. Selcom signature verification details are to be confirmed against official Selcom documentation or sandbox credentials in Stage 10.

transid.description: Unique Selcom transaction reference ID. Checked on backend for idempotency.

utilityref.description: The unique backend-generated payment reference associated with the order.

amount.description: Transaction payment amount in integer TZS.

msisdn.description: Customer mobile phone number in MSISDN format.

responsecode.description: Selcom result response code (e.g. '00' for success).
